seed_execution_case.description: Replay the main flow: create a ConfigParser with two sections, serialize to test_config.ini, then read and print the file content.
seed_execution_case.call_code:
result = serialize(config, path)
# Verify and print
if os.path.exists(path):
    with open(path, 'r') as f:
        content = f.read()
    print('Configuration file content:')
    print(content)
else:
    print('Failed to create configuration file.')
